config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu karena justru hak individu adalah batas agar kekuasaan tidak semena-mena. Di Indonesia, saya melihat bahwa ketika nama “kepentingan bersama” dipakai tanpa kontrol, sering kali yang terjadi malah orang kecil yang dikorbankan. Saya lebih percaya pada keseimbangan: masyarakat kuat kalau hak dasar tiap orang tetap dihormati.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically outrank individual rights. From an American perspective, I am wary of any argument that gives society a blank check to override personal freedoms, because history shows that "the common good" is often used to justify abuse of minorities or unpopular people. At the same time, I do not think individual rights are absolute in every case, since laws against violence, fraud, and public harm are necessary for everyone to live together safely. So my view is that society can limit rights only when the limits are narrow, necessary, and tightly justified, not just because the majority wants it.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap tidak setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu secara umum. Dari pengalaman melihat Indonesia, dalih “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pelanggaran terhadap orang kecil, padahal justru hak individu itu pagar supaya kekuasaan tidak liar. Memang benar ada situasi tertentu, seperti keamanan publik atau pencegahan bahaya, di mana hak bisa dibatasi, tetapi pembatasannya harus ketat, jelas, dan tidak boleh jadi alasan untuk menindas kelompok minoritas. Jadi bagi saya, yang paling sehat bukan menomorsatukan masyarakat secara mutlak, melainkan menjaga keseimbangan dengan hak dasar individu tetap jadi batas utama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take priority over individual rights as a general rule, because in the United States we have seen too many cases where “the public good” becomes a convenient excuse for trampling minorities or unpopular people. I do think society can and should limit rights in narrow cases like violence, fraud, or emergencies, but those limits need strict justification and oversight rather than a vague appeal to the majority. What I reject is the idea that the collective automatically outranks the person, because that mindset makes it too easy for power to become abusive. A healthy society is one that protects the common good by protecting basic rights first, not by treating individuals as disposable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis didahulukan di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya justru melihat bahaya besar ketika frasa “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai terlalu longgar, karena sering kali yang paling terdampak adalah orang kecil, warga minoritas, atau mereka yang tidak punya kuasa untuk melawan. Memang ada keadaan tertentu seperti bencana, keamanan publik, atau pencegahan bahaya nyata di mana pembatasan hak bisa dibenarkan, tetapi itu harus sangat ketat, transparan, dan tidak boleh jadi kebiasaan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan individu demi kolektif, melainkan yang melindungi hak dasar setiap orang agar kepentingan bersama tidak berubah jadi alat penindasan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically come before the rights of the individual, because in the United States that idea has too often been used to excuse overreach, censorship, and discrimination. I do not deny that society needs the power to act in emergencies or to prevent real harm, but those exceptions have to be narrow, transparent, and accountable. What I reject is the assumption that the collective is always morally superior to the person, because that is exactly how minorities get sacrificed for majority comfort. A strong society is one that earns the common good by respecting basic rights first, not by treating individual liberty as disposable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
